title: 2Pcs Pressure Relief Device for Triton, with Disc Seals Cover Valve, Shower Spares Parts Compatible with Triton Electric Showers (Replace of 82800450)
features: Triton Pressure Relief Device: Made of high-quality ABS material, it is safe and durable to keep your Triton Electric Shower working properly.
New Design: This pressure relief device adopts a seal cover design, which not only will not leak but also will burst for protection when the pressure of your showers is too high and safer.
Easy to use: Just need to replace the old pressure relief valve and put the new one back in place. perfect Replace of 82800450.
